content.text:
[Workflow Task from Orchestrator]
Workflow ID: 140efe20-063
Subtask ID: 23940f41
Priority: 2

Task: Write comprehensive unit tests for an email validation function. The tests should cover:

1. **Valid email formats:**
   - Standard email (user@example.com)
   - Email with dots in local part (first.last@example.com)
   - Email with plus sign (user+tag@example.com)
   - Subdomain (user@mail.example.com)
   - Single character local part (a@example.com)
   - Numbers in local and domain (user123@example456.com)

2. **Invalid email formats:**
   - Missing @ symbol (userexample.com)
   - Missing domain (@example.com)
   - Missing local part (user@)
   - Double @ symbols (user@@example.com)
   - Invalid characters (user space@example.com)
   - Missing TLD (user@example)
   - Multiple dots in domain (user@example..com)

3. **Edge cases:**
   - Empty string
   - Whitespace only
   - Very long email address
   - Unicode/international characters
   - Special characters that are valid (!#$%&'*+-/=?^_`{|}~)
   - Case sensitivity handling

Use Python with pytest framework. Include a placeholder implementation of the validation function that the tests will import and test against. Structure as a complete test file with descriptive test names and docstrings.
